Class Ticket

java.lang.Object
application.Ticket
public class Ticket extends Object
Ticket class represents an admin request ticket in the system. Used by instructors to request admin actions, tracked and resolved by admins.

    • isReopenedTicket

      public boolean isReopenedTicket()
      Checks if this ticket is a reopened ticket.
      Returns:
      true if this ticket references a parent ticket
